overview: Dr. Arman Kabir's Care is a comprehensive bilingual (English/Bangla) Patient Management and Doctor Portal for clinics and individual practitioners. It supports full outpatient and inpatient workflows with role-based dashboards for Consultants, Medical Officers, Interns, Nurses, Staff, and Patients. Features include prescription writing with clinical intelligence alerts, daily SOAP progress notes, handover system, appointment scheduling, drug reminder tracking, audit trail, and a public landing page for patient-facing appointment booking.
features: Role-based dashboards (Consultant, MO, Intern, Nurse, Staff, Patient)
Full outpatient and inpatient clinical workflows
Prescription & EMR with drug interaction and allergy alerts
Daily SOAP progress notes for admitted patients
Shift handover system with audible alerts
Appointment booking with conflict detection and walk-in support
Drug reminder system with missed dose escalation
Patient portal with complaints, vitals, and chat
Public landing page with appointment booking and emergency WhatsApp
Offline-first with cloud sync across all devices
PWA installable on Android and iPad
